title: Seeking database design support (RESOLVED)

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml:
UPDATE: Thank you everyone for your replies. We have selected a consultant to support us with this project. I’ll leave this thread as a resource to anyone seeking similar support.

Hi Everyone,

I am looking to hire an expert to consult on a restructuring of our boards used for tracking leads and case management.

We are a small firm of about 10 full-time employees. We interact with maybe between 800-1000 leads and service around 300 clients annually.

When I joined the company 2.5 years ago, they had just adopted Monday, and I ended up developing lots and lots of custom automations in Integromat (now Make) so that we could use Monday as a CRM. No one on the team had experience in database design, and this has led to a somewhat sprawling and redundant (albeit powerful and highly automated) environment with lots of room for improvement.

I would like to consult with someone with experience with database design, to plan an overhaul of our Monday account. I’m capable of implementing the changes, but I would like to hire a consultant for a series of meetings in which we review the current set up, identify normalization issues and other design flaws, and then develop a plan for a revised architecture.

Look forward to hearing from you!

-Max

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @max - sounds like an interesting project. We’d be happy to assist in your redesign/optimization of monday.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! We are also capable in external integration programs such as make.com to get the most out of your monday solution but also integrate seamlessly with all your other apps. Each of our Llamas are skilled in Development, Analysis, Project Management and Training. A number of us have programming backgrounds so database normalization is never an issue.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, but also to ensure we are the best possible fit. If you would like to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting. If you can’t find a time that works for you feel free to let us know and we will do our very best to accommodate you personally.

Lets work together to make an amazing solution!

Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.
